category.name: System Design
category.description: Architecture deep dives, scaling trade-offs, reliability patterns, and system design walkthroughs for backend engineers.
category.seoDescription: Practical system design articles on distributed systems, reliability, scalability, rate limiting, audit logs, multi-region architecture, and backend architecture trade-offs.

posts.title: System Design: Building a Feature Flag Platform
posts.description: Design a production feature flag platform: flag schemas, targeting rules, percentage rollouts, local SDK evaluation, streaming updates, audit logs, kill switches, experiments, consistency tradeoffs, and flag lifecycle management.
posts.excerpt: A feature flag platform decouples deployment from release. Code can be deployed safely while the feature remains disabled, then enabled gradually for internal users, beta customers, 1% of traffic, 10% of traffic, and eve…

posts.title: System Design: Building a Distributed Job Scheduler
